# MyCo IT — Your Personal IT Partner on Long Island
> https://mycoit.services

## About
MyCo IT provides personal, white glove technology support for homes and businesses across Long Island, NY. We serve Nassau and Suffolk County — from the Gold Coast to the Hamptons — with a focus on making technology approachable, reliable, and stress-free.

Based in Bay Shore, NY 11706.

## Services

### Home & Office IT Support
We set up, maintain, and fix your technology — computers, networks, printers, smart home devices, and more. Whether it's your home office, family network, or small business, we make it just work. No jargon, no runaround.
> https://mycoit.services/services/systems-support.html

### Networks & Connectivity
Reliable WiFi, secure networks, and seamless connectivity across your home or office. We design, install, and manage whole-home and business networking solutions including mesh WiFi, structured cabling, VPN, and firewall configuration.
> https://mycoit.services/services/network-support.html

### AI & LLM Guidance
Curious about ChatGPT, Claude, or AI tools for your business? We help you understand, adopt, and use AI effectively — at your own pace. Personal guidance sessions for individuals and small businesses.
> https://mycoit.services/services/llm-ai-support.html

## Service Areas
Garden City, Great Neck, Cold Spring Harbor, Huntington, Manhasset, Bay Shore, Babylon, Islip, Commack, Melville, Smithtown, Hauppauge, The Hamptons, and communities across all of Long Island.

Also serving: Roslyn, Oyster Bay, Port Washington, Northport, East Hampton, Southampton, Sag Harbor, Bridgehampton.

## Contact
- Website: https://mycoit.services/contact.html
- Location: Bay Shore, NY 11706
- Service Area: All of Long Island, NY (Nassau & Suffolk County)

## What Makes MyCo IT Different
- Your neighbor, not a call center — we live on Long Island too
- White glove service, every time — prompt, courteous, thorough
- Plain English, no jargon — you always understand what we're doing and what it costs
- AI-savvy — we stay on top of the latest in AI and emerging tech
- Remote & on-site support available
- Same-day response for urgent needs
